name: io.github.seekdaseek/agentfeed
title: AgentFeed
description: Crypto market + Solana on-chain data for AI agents, paid per-call in USDC via x402. SOL/BTC prices (Pyth), perp funding rates (Hyperliquid), Fear & Greed, wallet holdings and token metadata (Solana DAS). No API keys, no accounts - agents pay $0.001-$0.008 per call from their wallet. Free tools included.
